name: plugin-manifest-validator
description: Claude Code plugin manifest.yaml validator (FR-410). Validates the plugin manifest against the claude-code-plugin stack file (E77-S2): required-field presence, byte-exact `name == basename` invariant (LC_ALL=C), and manifest drift against on-disk state. Provider is shell-native (bash + awk + jq); no external binary beyond POSIX utilities. Drift severity is `high` (NOT `critical`) per Round 1+2 calibration — Claude Code discovers components via filesystem walk, not manifest, so drift is recoverable. Five-file layout (adapter.json + probe.sh + run.sh + normalize.sh + test/contract.bats) per FR-410 extension of the ADR-078 three-file base.
